Intel / Altera FPGA generated and reference-design material
============================================================

The Swan Song source tree includes files generated by or derived from Intel
Corporation / Altera Corporation FPGA tools and reference designs. Those files
retain their original embedded notices. They include, without limitation:

  src/fpga/ap_core.qsf
  src/fpga/ap_core_assignment_defaults.qdf
  src/fpga/apf/build_id_gen.tcl
  src/fpga/apf/mf_datatable.*
  src/fpga/apf/mf_ddio_bidir_12.*
  src/fpga/core/mf_pllbase*
  src/fpga/core/pin_ddio_clk.*

The embedded notices state that the source, tools, logic functions, generated
output files (including device-programming and simulation files), and related
information are subject to the applicable Intel/Altera agreements. Some files
limit use to programming Intel/Altera programmable-logic devices.

Primary Intel licensing information:

  https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/support/programmable/support-resources/intellectual-property/megacore-ip.html
  https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/support/programmable/licensing/support-center.html

This notice preserves the source-tree warning; it does not interpret the
applicable agreement, establish compatibility with another license, or
authorize distribution of Swan Song. Release remains blocked until the exact
Quartus Prime Lite 21.1.1 and generated-IP terms have been reviewed against
the final source and unrestricted RBF.
